message:
feat(api): add rate limit middleware with headers

Implement rate limiting middleware for the Gateway API:
- InMemoryRateLimiter class with sliding window counters
- rateLimitMiddleware and strictRateLimitMiddleware for Hono
- Key generators: byIP, byAPIKey, byUser, byWorkspace
- Composite key and withPath utilities for flexible limiting
- Standard rate limit headers (X-RateLimit-Limit/Remaining/Reset)
- 429 responses with Retry-After header and helpful hints
- Preset configurations (STANDARD, STRICT, RELAXED, BURST)
- 31 comprehensive tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
